items.title: Astrocartography trademark NUMBER 3 in the USA filed June 10 2026 🚨 during the Venus Jupiter
items.summary:
Astrocartography trademark NUMBER 3 in the USA filed June 10 2026 🚨 

during the Venus Jupiter conjunction. But the person messed up with that moon Saturn conjunction 🙂‍↔️ 

I predict it will be stopped. 

But still - THIS IS NOT OKAY.

The war on words continues. 

Everything is online. I just found out about this. 

Full episode on all the details of the trademark issue with astrocartography on my Cosmic Compass podcast and Helena Woods Astrology channel on YouTube, highly recommend listening to astrocartographer legend Robert Currey #astrocartography 

Comment YOUTUBE 👇 to listen to Robert’s take and info surrounding the trademark. He has the whole backstory with this France / Eu trademark. 

He’s the astrocartography OG for any of you new to this work! 🗺️

items.creator: 开普勒
items.title: Astrology of Health: Elements, Humors and Temperament
items.summary:
Join Dr. Masen Gaspervic in this short informative presentation on elements, humors and temperament. To join the class starting July 11, visit: https://store.keplercollege.org/product/elements-humors-temperaments-3/

To learn more about our astrology of healing certificate, visit: https://www.keplercollege.org/certificates/astrology-of-healing/

#astrology #health #medicalastrology #keplercollege 

Chapters: 

00:00 Introduction 
02:26 History of Humoral Theory (Hippocrates and Galen)
03:42 Humors, Temperaments, and Health
05:16 Defining the Four Temperaments (Physical and Behavioral)
06:54 Modern Temperament Research (Carl Jung, Ivan Pavlov, Hans Selye)
10:51 Assessing Individual Vulnerability
12:54 Disease and the Impact of Non-Naturals
13:45 Diagnosis and Treatment Strategies
15:26 Case Study: Donald Trump (Choleric Temperament)
17:03 Case Study: Bill Clinton (Balanced Temperament)
18:17 Predictive Decumbiture Example (COVID Case)
19:43 Summary of Four-Step Method and Conclusion
20:20 Conclusion 

Recorded June 2026

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: Thema Mundi: How the Planets Came to Rule Two Zodiac Signs
items.summary:
This is an animation of an ancient Persian myth about how the traditional planets came to rule two signs of the zodiac in astrology. 

The narration and script with some embellishments on the original story are by Chris Brennan, and the animation was done by Jack Cusumano.

The original myth is preserved in Codices Vaticani 15, fol. 229, edited in CCAG 5, pt. 2 pp. 130-37 by I. Bidez, privately translated by Demetra George.
